# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-allow-from-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: gateway-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: gateway-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-from-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: frontend-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: tcp
  proxyProtocol: Opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-allow-from-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - backend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: gateway
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
